title: Win soda challenge
description: A casual puzzle game full of fun. The player needs to manipulate the can flexibly to color the squares in the maze. Different colored squares will have different chemical reactions, soda cans offer a huge variety of missions to challenge you, especially to test your reaction and hand speed, the whole operation is not difficult to use.
instructions: Use the mouse to click the adjacent pipeline connection repairthe pipeline can be received soda come together to drink soda
